settings.title: Preferences
settings.max_cps.tooltip: Maximum automatic clicks per second. Too high may trigger anti-cheat. Recommended: 3~10.
settings.scan_interval.tooltip: How often to check the screen. Lower values react faster but use more CPU. Default 500ms.
settings.default_match_mode.tooltip: How to determine if text is 'found': contains / exact / fuzzy (tolerates small differences) / regex (advanced).
settings.close_behavior.tooltip: What happens when you click the X button: minimize to tray or quit entirely.
settings.show_close_confirm.tooltip: Ask 'Are you sure?' when clicking X to prevent accidental closes.
settings.auto_update.tooltip: Automatically check GitHub for new versions every time the program starts.
settings.default_mouse_button.tooltip: Default mouse button for clicks. Left is suitable for most games.
settings.default_random_offset.tooltip: Randomize click position by a few pixels to avoid detection. Set 0 to disable.
settings.default_fuzzy_threshold.tooltip: How strict text matching is. Higher values require closer matches. Default 0.8.
settings.default_template_threshold.tool: How strict image matching is. Higher values are stricter. Default 0.85.
settings.default_color_tolerance.tooltip: How much color difference is allowed during image matching. 0 = exact match.
main.name: Name:
main.ready: Ready — select a window and add a rule
status.emergency_stop: 🛑 Emergency Stop — Press Start to resume
status.ahk_not_installed: ⚠ AHK not installed, click function unavailable (click to install)
status.ahk_not_started: ⚠ AHK not started, click function unavailable
status.window_not_found: ⚠ No windows found, please launch the target program first
status.update_complete: ✅ Updated to v{v}! Report issues on GitHub if needed
status.rule_list_empty:
No rules created yet!
Please add at least one rule.
status.no_window: Please select a target window first
status.stop_first_delete_task: Please stop detection before deleting a task
status.stop_first_delete_group: Please stop detection before deleting a group
status.stop_first_delete_rule: Please stop detection before deleting a rule
status.stop_first_add_rule: Please stop detection before adding a rule
status.stop_first_move_rule: Please stop detection before moving a rule
status.stop_first_copy_rule: Please stop detection before copying a rule
status.stop_first_debug: Please stop the detection loop before opening debug mode.
status.at_least_one_group: Please select at least one group.
dialog.close_confirm.title: Confirm Close
dialog.close_confirm.msg: Are you sure you want to quit?
dialog.close_confirm.tray_msg: Are you sure you want to minimize to tray?
dialog.close_confirm.background_msg: The program is still running in the background. Double-click the tray icon to restore.
dialog.delete_task_msg:
Delete task "{name}" and all its rules?
This cannot be undone.
dialog.import_task_invalid: Invalid file format or no valid rules. Please ensure it's a JSON with a rules array.
dialog.import_task_too_large: File too large (over 10 MB). Please verify it's a correct task file.
dialog.install_ahk_msg:
This tool needs AutoHotkey v2 for mouse clicks and keyboard input.
Download and install automatically? (~3MB, no admin rights needed)
dialog.install_ahk_success: Restart the tool after installation and it will be detected automatically.
dialog.uncategorized_system:
"Uncategorized" is a system group and cannot be deleted.
Use the right-click menu "Clear Uncategorized" to remove all rules.
dialog.at_least_one_task: At least one task must remain.
dialog.delete_group_has_rules: The group contains {count} rules, which will also be deleted.
dialog.delete_uncategorized_confirm:
Delete all rules in "Uncategorized" ({count} rules)?
This cannot be undone.
dialog.dependency_warning: ⚠ The following rules depend on this rule and will break:
tooltip.task_combo: Switch task — each task contains its own set of rules
tooltip.debug: Show all recognized text and positions in the window in real time
tooltip.sponsor: If this tool helps you, feel free to buy the developer a coffee ☕
tooltip.settings: Open preferences (CPS, match mode, themes, etc.)
tooltip.guide: Open the interactive guide on GitHub Pages
tooltip.group_item: Right-click to rename, group settings, move up/down, delete
tooltip.rule_item: Right-click to copy rule, move to another group
tooltip.roi: Leave unset to scan the whole window. Setting an ROI speeds up detection.
tooltip.roi_compare: Set an ROI for OCR. Leave unset to scan the whole window.
tooltip.fail_duration: Only trigger fail action when consecutive failures exceed this duration. 0 = trigger immediately.
tooltip.hold_ms: 0 = press and release immediately; >0 = hold for specified ms then release
tooltip.wait_ms: Only executes if previous step succeeded. Skipped on detection failure.
tooltip.match_color: When checked, preserves color info for matching (default is grayscale, shape-only matching)
tooltip.color_tolerance: Per-pixel average color difference tolerance (0=exact, 255=almost no check, default 100 filters significant color differences)
ui.add_first_rule: ← Click "Add" to create your first rule
ui.background_monitor_hint:
Background monitor: scans independently each frame, not part of group flow.
Suitable for always-watching conditions (error prompts, emergency stops).
ui.regenerate_ids: Regenerate all rule IDs (avoid conflicts with existing rules)
ui.start_guide: New here? Click the "?" button in the top-right of the window anytime.
guide.step2: ② Click "Add" to create a rule
guide.step3: ③ Set trigger text and click parameters
guide.step5: ⑤ Click "Start" to begin automatic detection
guide.advanced: Advanced: Steps execute in order. Each step can specify what to do when not found.
guide.advanced2: For example, if match_image fails, skip detect and execute key directly.
guide.advanced3: Try match_image → detect → click three-step chain!
notif.template_rule_added_from_debug: Created template rule from OCR debug: "{name}"
notif.rule_from_debug_detect: Rule "{name}" added detect step "{text}" from OCR debug (id={id})
notif.rule_from_debug_template: Rule "{name}" added template step "{name}" from OCR debug (id={id})
notif.rule_from_debug_new_template: Rule "{name}" created as template from OCR debug (id={id})
notif.rule_validation_empty_text: Step {idx} (Detect Text): target text cannot be empty
notif.rule_validation_no_image: Step {idx} (Image Match): no template image set
notif.rule_validation_empty_regex: Step {idx} (Compare): regex is empty, will match all numbers
notif.rule_validation_missing_rule: Step {idx} (Jump): referenced rule no longer exists
notif.rule_validation_zero_click: Step {idx} (Click): custom coordinates (0,0) may not be set correctly, please pick coordinates
notif.steps_empty:
The following enabled rules have no steps. Please add steps first:
{names}{suffix}
ocr_debug.click_test_status: Click test {status}: "{text}"  rect({rx},{ry}) OCR center({cx},{cy}) Screen({sx},{sy})
ocr_debug.step_added: ✓ Added detect step: "{text}"  ROI(px): x={x}, y={y}, w={w}, h={h}
update.download_failed_manual: AutoHotkey download failed, please download and install manually:
update.apply_prompt:
v{version} downloaded and verified.
Restart now to apply the update?
update.apply_failed:
Failed to apply update: {error}

Please download and replace the file manually.

Failed to check for updates: {msg}

Please check GitHub for the latest version manually.
update.download_error:

about.author: Author: {author}
format.author: Author: {author}
status.last_window_not_found: ⚠ Previous window "{title}" no longer exists, please re-select
status.update_found: New version v{version} available (click to update)
img_compare.no_window: ⚠️ Please select a target window first
step_form.detect_hint: Set a detection region to limit OCR area
step_form.step_detect_desc: Detect text with OCR — accurate but slightly slower
step_form.step_match_image_desc: Match image regions — fast and robust; recommended
step_form.step_notify_desc: Show notification and optionally stop groups
settings.language.tooltip: Select interface language. Restart the program for the change to take effect.
step_form.regex_pattern_tooltip: Regex to extract numbers from OCR text. Default -?\d+\.?\d* matches integers and decimals.
tooltip.add_step: Add steps to a rule — steps execute in order. Use advanced settings to specify fail behavior.
ocr_debug.capture.tooltip: Capture one frame and run OCR (Alt+C)
ocr_debug.click_test.tooltip: Click the target position of selected text to verify coordinates
ocr_debug.no_capture: No capture yet — click "Capture" to start
ocr_debug.crop_hint: Click a row in the table to show the cropped preview here
ocr_debug.create_template_rule.tooltip: Create an image match rule from the selected region. Fast, good for buttons/ icons without text.
ocr_debug.add_template_step.tooltip: Add the selected region as an image match step to the current rule. Good for buttons/ icons.
ocr_debug.create_text_rule.tooltip: Create a new OCR text detection rule from the selected text and position.
ocr_debug.add_text_step.tooltip: Add the selected text as an OCR detect step to the current rule.
ocr_debug.rule_created: ✓ Created new rule: "{text}"  ROI(px): x={x}, y={y}, w={w}, h={h}
group_settings.title: Group Settings — {name}
group_settings.name: Group Name
group_settings.order.tooltip: Sequential: runs one rule at a time, only advances on trigger. Parallel: scans all rules each frame, first match executes.
group_settings.seq_hint: Sequential: runs one rule per cycle. The pointer advances only when the rule triggers. Otherwise re-executes the same rule.
group_settings.par_hint: Parallel: scans all rules from the top each frame. The first hit executes; others are skipped. Reset each frame.
overlay.roi_instruction: Drag to select detection region{dim}  |  Release to confirm  |  Esc to cancel
overlay.click_instruction: Click on the target position  |  Esc to cancel
overlay.capture_instruction: Drag to select template{dim}  |  Release to confirm  |  Esc to cancel
test.title: Test
test.select_window: Please select a target window first
test.click_target_no_detect: [{idx}] ⚠ Target is "Detection Target" but no previous detect result
test.drag_start_no_detect: [{idx}] ⚠ Drag start is "Detection Target" but no previous detect result
test.compare_no_digit: [{idx}] 🔢 No number matched from text pattern= "{pattern}"
